In [2]:
import warnings
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from matplotlib.patches import Patch
import seaborn as sns
from sklearn.decomposition import PCA
from sklearn.manifold import TSNE
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
from scipy import stats

warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')
sns.set_theme(style='whitegrid', font_scale=1.1)
In [13]:
df = pd.read_csv('GSE211692_processed_data_matrix.txt', sep="\t", index_col=0)
meta = pd.read_csv('GSE211692_metadata.csv')
df = df.apply(pd.to_numeric, errors='coerce')
print(f'Raw shape: {df.shape[0]} features × {df.shape[1]} samples')

# Check if already log-scale (microarray)
if df.max().max() < 30:
    print('Data appears log-scale — skipping log2 transform')
    df_log = df.copy()
else:
    print('Data appears raw-scale — applying log2 transform')
    df_log = np.log2(df + 1)

# Clean NaN globally (microarray missing probes)
n_nan_before = df_log.isna().sum().sum()
df_log = df_log.apply(lambda row: row.fillna(row.median()), axis=1)
df_log = df_log[df_log.var(axis=1) > 0]
df = df.loc[df_log.index]  # keep in sync
print(f'NaN filled: {n_nan_before:,} values')
print(f'After cleanup: {df_log.shape[0]} features × {df_log.shape[1]} samples')

Raw shape: 2565 features × 16190 samples
Data appears log-scale — skipping log2 transform
NaN filled: 0 values
After cleanup: 2565 features × 16190 samples
In [14]:
print(f'Metadata: {len(meta)} rows')
print(f'Columns: {list(meta.columns)}')

# Match to expression columns
label_lookup = dict(zip(meta['Title'], meta['Disease State']))
labels = pd.Series(df.columns.map(label_lookup), index=df.columns)

unmatched = labels.isna().sum()
if unmatched > 0:
    print(f'⚠ {unmatched} columns not matched — dropping them')
    keep = labels.dropna().index
    df = df[keep]; df_log = df_log[keep]; labels = labels[keep]

print(f'\nMatched: {len(labels)} samples, {labels.nunique()} classes')
print(labels.value_counts().to_string())

Metadata: 16190 rows
Columns: ['Sample ID', 'Title', 'Disease State', 'Gender', 'Age', 'Stage']

Matched: 16190 samples, 19 classes
no cancer                                                       5643
lung cancer                                                     1699
colorectal cancer                                               1596
gastric cancer                                                  1418
prostate cancer                                                 1027
pancreatic cancer                                                851
breast cancer                                                    675
esophageal squamous cell cancer                                  566
biliary tract cancer                                             402
ovarian cancer                                                   400
bladder cancer                                                   399
hepatocellular cancer                                            348
benign disease in the bone and soft tissue                       313
bone and soft tissue sarcomas                                    299
intraparenchymal brain tumors                                    241
benign disease in the prostate                                   230
benign disease in the breast                                      31
benign disease in the ovary                                       28
extraparenchymal brain tumor and benign disease in the brain      24
In [33]:
def to_group(x):
    x = str(x).lower()
    if x == 'no cancer': return 'No Cancer'
    elif 'benign' in x: return 'Benign'
    else: return 'Cancer'

labels_binary = labels.map(to_group)
organ_map = {
    'lung cancer': 'Respiratory',
    'colorectal cancer': 'GI', 'gastric cancer': 'GI',
    'esophageal squamous cell cancer': 'GI', 'pancreatic cancer': 'GI',
    'biliary tract cancer': 'GI', 'hepatocellular cancer': 'GI',
    'breast cancer': 'Breast',
    'prostate cancer': 'Urogenital', 'bladder cancer': 'Urogenital',
    'ovarian cancer': 'Gynecologic',
    'bone and soft tissue sarcomas': 'Sarcoma',
    'intraparenchymal brain tumors': 'CNS',
    'no cancer': 'No Cancer',
}
labels_organ = labels.map(lambda x: organ_map.get(x, 'Benign' if 'benign' in str(x).lower() else x))
meta_lookup = meta.set_index('Title')
unique_labels = labels.value_counts().index.tolist()
PAL = dict(zip(unique_labels, sns.color_palette('tab20', len(unique_labels)).as_hex()))
PAL_BIN = {'Cancer': '#F97066', 'No Cancer': '#14B8A6', 'Benign': '#F59E0B'}
PAL_ORGAN = dict(zip(labels_organ.value_counts().index, sns.color_palette('cividis', labels_organ.nunique()).as_hex()))

print(f'Binary:  {labels_binary.value_counts().to_dict()}')
print(f'Organ:   {labels_organ.value_counts().to_dict()}')

Binary:  {'Cancer': 9921, 'No Cancer': 5643, 'Benign': 626}
Organ:   {'No Cancer': 5643, 'GI': 5181, 'Respiratory': 1699, 'Urogenital': 1426, 'Breast': 675, 'Benign': 626, 'Gynecologic': 400, 'Sarcoma': 299, 'CNS': 241}
In [34]:
total_signal = df_log.sum(axis=0)
sparsity = (df.isna().sum().sum() + (df == 0).sum().sum()) / df.size

print(f'Features         : {df_log.shape[0]:,}')
print(f'Samples          : {df_log.shape[1]:,}')
print(f'Disease classes   : {labels.nunique()}')
print(f'Missing + zeros  : {sparsity:.1%}')
print(f'Expression range : {df_log.min().min():.2f} – {df_log.max().max():.2f}')
print(f'Median total sig : {total_signal.median():,.1f}')

# Per-class summary
print(f'\n{"Class":45s} {"n":>6s} {"Median Signal":>14s}')
print('-' * 70)
for lbl in unique_labels:
    m = labels == lbl
    print(f'{lbl:45s} {m.sum():>6,} {total_signal[m].median():>14,.1f}')

In [35]:
counts = labels.value_counts()

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(16, 7))

# Left: all 19 classes
colors = [PAL.get(c, '#999') for c in counts.index]
axes[0].barh(range(len(counts)), counts.values, color=colors, edgecolor='white', linewidth=0.8)
axes[0].set_yticks(range(len(counts)))
axes[0].set_yticklabels(counts.index, fontsize=9)
axes[0].set_xlabel('Number of Samples')
axes[0].set_title('All 19 Disease Classes', fontweight='bold')
axes[0].invert_yaxis()
for i, v in enumerate(counts.values):
    axes[0].text(v + max(counts) * 0.01, i, f'{v:,}', va='center', fontsize=8)

# Right: grouped donut
group_totals = labels_binary.value_counts()
wedge_colors = [PAL_BIN[g] for g in group_totals.index]
axes[1].pie(group_totals,
            labels=[f'{g}\n(n={v:,})' for g, v in group_totals.items()],
            colors=wedge_colors, autopct='%1.1f%%', startangle=90, pctdistance=0.75,
            textprops={'fontsize': 12},
            wedgeprops={'edgecolor': 'white', 'linewidth': 2, 'width': 0.5})
axes[1].set_title('Cancer vs Benign vs No Cancer', fontweight='bold')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

print(f'Total: {counts.sum():,}  |  Classes: {len(counts)}')
print(f'Imbalance ratio: {counts.max()/counts.min():.0f}x')
small = counts[counts < 50]
if len(small) > 0:
    print(f'\n⚠ Classes <50 samples (risky for ML):')
    print(small.to_string())

Total: 16,190  |  Classes: 19
Imbalance ratio: 235x

⚠ Classes <50 samples (risky for ML):
benign disease in the breast                                    31
benign disease in the ovary                                     28
extraparenchymal brain tumor and benign disease in the brain    24

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 5))
organ_counts.plot.bar(ax=ax, color=[PAL_ORGAN.get(c, '#999') for c in organ_counts.index],
                      edgecolor='white', linewidth=1.5)
ax.set_title('Samples by Class', fontweight='bold')
ax.set_ylabel('Count')
ax.set_xticklabels(ax.get_xticklabels(), rotation=35, ha='right')
for i, v in enumerate(organ_counts.values):
    ax.text(i, v + 50, f'{v:,}', ha='center', fontsize=9)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [37]:
meta['Age'] = pd.to_numeric(meta['Age'], errors='coerce')
meta['_group'] = meta['Disease State'].map(to_group)

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(18, 5))

# Age by group
sns.boxplot(data=meta, x='_group', y='Age', palette=PAL_BIN, ax=axes[0],
            order=['Cancer', 'Benign', 'No Cancer'], width=0.5)
axes[0].set_title('Age by Group', fontweight='bold')
axes[0].set_xlabel('')

# Age by top 8 cancer types
top8 = meta[meta['_group'] == 'Cancer']['Disease State'].value_counts().head(8).index
sub = meta[meta['Disease State'].isin(top8)]
sns.boxplot(data=sub, x='Disease State', y='Age', palette='Set2', ax=axes[1], width=0.6)
axes[1].set_xticklabels(axes[1].get_xticklabels(), rotation=40, ha='right', fontsize=8)
axes[1].set_title('Age by Cancer Type (top 8)', fontweight='bold')
axes[1].set_xlabel('')

# Gender breakdown
ct = pd.crosstab(meta['_group'], meta['Gender'], normalize='index') * 100
ct.plot.bar(stacked=True, ax=axes[2], colormap='Set2', edgecolor='white', width=0.6)
axes[2].set_title('Gender Distribution by Group', fontweight='bold')
axes[2].set_ylabel('Percentage')
axes[2].set_xticklabels(axes[2].get_xticklabels(), rotation=0)
axes[2].legend(title='Gender', bbox_to_anchor=(1.02, 1))

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

print(f'Median age — Cancer: {meta[meta["_group"]=="Cancer"]["Age"].median():.0f}')
print(f'             No Cancer: {meta[meta["_group"]=="No Cancer"]["Age"].median():.0f}')
print(f'             Benign: {meta[meta["_group"]=="Benign"]["Age"].median():.0f}')

Median age — Cancer: 65
             No Cancer: 72
             Benign: 58
In [38]:
meta['Stage'] = pd.to_numeric(meta['Stage'], errors='coerce')
cancer = meta[meta['_group'] == 'Cancer'].copy()

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(18, 5))

# Overall stage distribution
stg_counts = cancer['Stage'].value_counts().sort_index()
stg_counts.plot.bar(ax=axes[0], color=['#14B8A6', '#F59E0B', '#F97066', '#DC2626', '#7F1D1D'],
                    edgecolor='white')
axes[0].set_title('Stage Distribution (all cancers)', fontweight='bold')
axes[0].set_xlabel('Stage')
for i, v in enumerate(stg_counts.values):
    axes[0].text(i, v + 30, f'{v:,}', ha='center', fontsize=9)

# Early vs late per cancer type (top 8)
cancer['stage_group'] = cancer['Stage'].apply(
    lambda x: 'Early (0-1)' if x <= 1 else ('Mid (2)' if x == 2 else 'Late (3-4)'))
top8_cancer = cancer['Disease State'].value_counts().head(8).index
ct = pd.crosstab(cancer[cancer['Disease State'].isin(top8_cancer)]['Disease State'],
                 cancer[cancer['Disease State'].isin(top8_cancer)]['stage_group'])
ct = ct.reindex(columns=['Early (0-1)', 'Mid (2)', 'Late (3-4)'], fill_value=0)
ct.plot.barh(stacked=True, ax=axes[1], color=['#14B8A6', '#F59E0B', '#F97066'], edgecolor='white')
axes[1].set_title('Stage by Cancer Type (top 8)', fontweight='bold')
axes[1].set_xlabel('Count')
axes[1].legend(title='Stage', fontsize=8)

# Stage completeness
stg_missing = cancer['Stage'].isna().sum()
stg_present = cancer['Stage'].notna().sum()
axes[2].pie([stg_present, stg_missing],
            labels=[f'Has stage\n(n={stg_present:,})', f'Missing\n(n={stg_missing:,})'],
            colors=['#14B8A6', '#E5E7EB'], autopct='%1.1f%%', startangle=90,
            textprops={'fontsize': 11}, wedgeprops={'edgecolor': 'white', 'linewidth': 2})
axes[2].set_title('Stage Data Completeness', fontweight='bold')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

n_early = (cancer['Stage'] <= 1).sum()
n_late = (cancer['Stage'] >= 3).sum()
print(f'Early (0-1): {n_early:,}  |  Mid (2): {(cancer["Stage"]==2).sum():,}  |  Late (3-4): {n_late:,}')

Early (0-1): 4,889  |  Mid (2): 1,648  |  Late (3-4): 2,216
In [39]:
mean_expr = df_log.mean(axis=1)
var_expr = df_log.var(axis=1)
total_signal = df_log.sum(axis=0)

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(17, 4.5))

# Signal intensity distribution by group
for grp in ['Cancer', 'No Cancer', 'Benign']:
    m = labels_binary == grp
    axes[0].hist(total_signal[m], bins=40, alpha=0.5, label=f'{grp} (n={m.sum():,})',
                 color=PAL_BIN[grp], edgecolor='none')
axes[0].set_title('Total Signal by Group', fontweight='bold')
axes[0].set_xlabel('Sum of Expression'); axes[0].legend(fontsize=8)

# Mean expression per feature
axes[1].hist(mean_expr, bins=60, color='#0D7377', edgecolor='white', alpha=0.8)
axes[1].axvline(mean_expr.median(), color='#F97066', ls='--', lw=1.5,
                label=f'Median = {mean_expr.median():.2f}')
axes[1].set_title('Mean Expression / Feature', fontweight='bold')
axes[1].set_xlabel('Mean Expression'); axes[1].legend()

# Variance per feature
axes[2].hist(var_expr, bins=60, color='#F59E0B', edgecolor='white', alpha=0.8)
axes[2].set_title('Variance / Feature', fontweight='bold')
axes[2].set_xlabel('Variance')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

# Test signal difference between groups
h, p = stats.kruskal(
    total_signal[labels_binary == 'Cancer'],
    total_signal[labels_binary == 'No Cancer'],
    total_signal[labels_binary == 'Benign'])
print(f'Kruskal-Wallis signal across groups: H={h:.1f}, p={p:.2g}')

Kruskal-Wallis signal across groups: H=7934.8, p=0

top20 = df_log.mean(axis=1).nlargest(20).sort_values()

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(8, 6))
ax.barh(range(len(top20)), top20.values, color='#0D7377', edgecolor='white')
ax.set_yticks(range(len(top20)))
ax.set_yticklabels(top20.index, fontsize=8)
ax.set_xlabel('Mean Expression')
ax.set_title('Top 20 Most Abundant miRNAs', fontweight='bold')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [41]:
top30 = df_log.var(axis=1).nlargest(30).index
corr = df_log.loc[top30].T.corr()

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 8))
sns.heatmap(corr, cmap='RdBu_r', center=0, vmin=-1, vmax=1, square=True,
            linewidths=0.2, ax=ax, cbar_kws={'shrink': 0.7, 'label': 'Pearson r'},
            xticklabels=True, yticklabels=True)
ax.tick_params(labelsize=7)
ax.set_title('Correlation — Top 30 Variable miRNAs', fontweight='bold')
plt.setp(ax.get_xticklabels(), rotation=45, ha='right', rotation_mode='anchor')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [42]:
filt = df_log[df_log.var(axis=1) > df_log.var(axis=1).quantile(0.25)]
X = StandardScaler().fit_transform(filt.T.values)

pca = PCA(n_components=10)
Xp = pca.fit_transform(X)
ve = pca.explained_variance_ratio_
print(f'PC1: {ve[0]:.1%}  |  PC2: {ve[1]:.1%}  |  Top-5: {sum(ve[:5]):.1%}')
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(20, 5.5))

# A: Binary
for grp in ['Cancer', 'Benign', 'No Cancer']:
    m = labels_binary.values == grp
    axes[0].scatter(Xp[m, 0], Xp[m, 1], c=PAL_BIN[grp], label=grp,
                    alpha=0.3, s=8, edgecolors='none')
axes[0].set_xlabel(f'PC1 ({ve[0]:.1%})'); axes[0].set_ylabel(f'PC2 ({ve[1]:.1%})')
axes[0].set_title('PCA — Cancer vs Control', fontweight='bold')
axes[0].legend(fontsize=8, markerscale=3)

# B: Top 8 cancer types
top8 = labels.value_counts().head(8).index
for cls in top8:
    m = labels.values == cls
    axes[1].scatter(Xp[m, 0], Xp[m, 1], c=PAL.get(cls, '#999'),
                    label=cls[:25], alpha=0.3, s=8, edgecolors='none')
other = ~np.isin(labels.values, top8)
axes[1].scatter(Xp[other, 0], Xp[other, 1], c='#E5E7EB', alpha=0.15, s=5, edgecolors='none')
axes[1].set_xlabel(f'PC1 ({ve[0]:.1%})'); axes[1].set_ylabel(f'PC2 ({ve[1]:.1%})')
axes[1].set_title('PCA — Top 8 Classes', fontweight='bold')
axes[1].legend(fontsize=6, markerscale=3, loc='best')

# C: Organ system
for org in labels_organ.value_counts().index:
    m = labels_organ.values == org
    axes[2].scatter(Xp[m, 0], Xp[m, 1], c=PAL_ORGAN.get(org, '#999'),
                    label=org, alpha=0.3, s=8, edgecolors='none')
axes[2].set_xlabel(f'PC1 ({ve[0]:.1%})'); axes[2].set_ylabel(f'PC2 ({ve[1]:.1%})')
axes[2].set_title('PCA — Cancer Types', fontweight='bold')
axes[2].legend(fontsize=7, markerscale=3, loc='best')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

PC1: 32.0%  |  PC2: 6.5%  |  Top-5: 45.6%
In [43]:
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(7, 4))
ax.bar(range(1, len(ve)+1), ve*100, color='#0D7377', edgecolor='white')
ax.plot(range(1, len(ve)+1), np.cumsum(ve)*100, 'o-', color='#F97066', ms=5)
ax.set_xlabel('PC'); ax.set_ylabel('Variance Explained (%)')
ax.set_title('Scree Plot', fontweight='bold')
ax.set_xticks(range(1, len(ve)+1))
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [45]:
MAX_TSNE = 10000
rng = np.random.RandomState(42)
idx = rng.choice(X.shape[0], min(MAX_TSNE, X.shape[0]), replace=False)
print(f't-SNE on {len(idx)} samples')

Xt = TSNE(n_components=2, perplexity=30, random_state=42).fit_transform(X[idx])
lab_tsne = labels_binary.values[idx]
lab_tsne_full = labels.values[idx]
lab_tsne_organ = labels_organ.values[idx]

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(20, 5.5))

# Binary
for grp in ['Cancer', 'Benign', 'No Cancer']:
    m = lab_tsne == grp
    axes[0].scatter(Xt[m, 0], Xt[m, 1], c=PAL_BIN[grp], label=grp, alpha=0.4, s=10, edgecolors='none')
axes[0].set_title('t-SNE — Binary', fontweight='bold'); axes[0].legend(fontsize=8, markerscale=3)

# Cancer types
for cls in top8:
    m = lab_tsne_full == cls
    axes[1].scatter(Xt[m, 0], Xt[m, 1], c=PAL.get(cls, '#999'), label=cls[:25], alpha=0.4, s=10, edgecolors='none')
other = ~np.isin(lab_tsne_full, top8)
axes[1].scatter(Xt[other, 0], Xt[other, 1], c='#E5E7EB', alpha=0.15, s=5, edgecolors='none')
axes[1].set_title('t-SNE — Cancer Types', fontweight='bold'); axes[1].legend(fontsize=6, markerscale=3)

# Organ
for org in labels_organ.value_counts().index:
    m = lab_tsne_organ == org
    axes[2].scatter(Xt[m, 0], Xt[m, 1], c=PAL_ORGAN.get(org, '#999'), label=org, alpha=0.4, s=10, edgecolors='none')
axes[2].set_title('t-SNE — Organ System', fontweight='bold'); axes[2].legend(fontsize=7, markerscale=3)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

t-SNE on 10000 samples
In [46]:
test_classes = [c for c in unique_labels if 'benign' not in c.lower()]
print(f'Testing across {len(test_classes)} classes (excl. benign)')

results = []
for feat in df_log.index:
    groups = [df_log.loc[feat, labels == c].values for c in test_classes if (labels == c).sum() >= 10]
    if len(groups) >= 2:
        h, p = stats.kruskal(*groups)
        results.append({'miRNA': feat, 'H_stat': h, 'pvalue': p})

de = pd.DataFrame(results)
de['neg_log10_p'] = -np.log10(de['pvalue'].clip(lower=1e-300))
de = de.sort_values('pvalue').reset_index(drop=True)
de['rank'] = range(1, len(de) + 1)
de['padj'] = (de['pvalue'] * len(de) / de['rank']).clip(upper=1.0)
de['padj'] = de['padj'][::-1].cummin()[::-1]

sig = de[de['padj'] < 0.05]
print(f'Significant miRNAs (padj < 0.05): {len(sig)} / {len(de)}')

Testing across 14 classes (excl. benign)
Significant miRNAs (padj < 0.05): 2565 / 2565
In [48]:
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(14, 6))

# Manhattan-style: H-stat vs rank
colors = ['#F97066' if p < 0.05 else '#D4D4D4' for p in de['padj']]
axes[0].scatter(range(len(de)), de['neg_log10_p'], c=colors, s=8, alpha=0.6, edgecolors='none')
axes[0].axhline(-np.log10(0.05), color='grey', ls='--', lw=0.8, label='p=0.05')
axes[0].set_xlabel('Feature Rank')
axes[0].set_ylabel('-log10(p-value)')
axes[0].set_title('Kruskal-Wallis Significance', fontweight='bold')
axes[0].legend()

# Top 20 by H-stat
top20_de = de.nlargest(20, 'H_stat').sort_values('H_stat')
axes[1].barh(range(len(top20_de)), top20_de['H_stat'], color='#0D7377', edgecolor='white')
axes[1].set_yticks(range(len(top20_de)))
axes[1].set_yticklabels(top20_de['miRNA'], fontsize=8)
axes[1].set_xlabel('H-statistic')
axes[1].set_title('Top 20 Differentially Expressed miRNAs', fontweight='bold')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [49]:
top10_mirnas = de.nlargest(10, 'H_stat')['miRNA'].values
cancer_classes = [c for c in unique_labels if c != 'no cancer' and 'benign' not in c.lower()]

# Mean expression per class
mean_by_class = pd.DataFrame(
    {cls: df_log.loc[top10_mirnas, labels == cls].mean(axis=1) for cls in ['no cancer'] + cancer_classes})

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 5))
sns.heatmap(mean_by_class, cmap='RdYlBu_r', ax=ax, annot=False,
            xticklabels=True, yticklabels=True, linewidths=0.5)
ax.tick_params(labelsize=8)
ax.set_xticklabels(ax.get_xticklabels(), rotation=40, ha='right')
ax.set_title('Top 10 DE miRNAs — Mean Expression by Cancer Type', fontweight='bold')
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [56]:
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches

MAX_CLUST = 500
idx_c = rng.choice(df_log.shape[1], min(MAX_CLUST, df_log.shape[1]), replace=False)
df_clust = df_log.iloc[:, idx_c]
labels_clust = labels.iloc[idx_c]

top50 = df_clust.var(axis=1).nlargest(50).index
col_colors = [PAL.get(l, '#999') for l in labels_clust]

g = sns.clustermap(df_clust.loc[top50], cmap='viridis', col_colors=col_colors,
                   figsize=(13, 9), dendrogram_ratio=(0.1, 0.1), xticklabels=False,
                   yticklabels=True, linewidths=0, method='ward',
                   cbar_kws={'label': 'Expression'})
g.ax_heatmap.tick_params(labelsize=7)
g.fig.suptitle(f'Clustering — Top 50 Variable miRNAs (n={MAX_CLUST} subsample)',
               fontweight='bold', y=1.01)

handles = [mpatches.Patch(fc=PAL.get(l, '#999'), label=l[:25]) for l in unique_labels[:10]]
handles.append(mpatches.Patch(fc='#999', label=f'+ {len(unique_labels)-10} more'))
g.ax_heatmap.legend(handles=handles, loc='upper left', bbox_to_anchor=(1.1, 1.), fontsize=6)
plt.show()
In [62]:
from statsmodels.stats.multitest import multipletests

is_cancer = labels_binary == 'Cancer'
is_nc = labels_binary == 'No Cancer'

binary_res = []
for feat in df_log.index:
    vc = df_log.loc[feat, is_cancer].values
    vn = df_log.loc[feat, is_nc].values
    fc = vc.mean() - vn.mean()
    _, p = stats.ttest_ind(vc, vn, equal_var=False)
    binary_res.append({'miRNA': feat, 'log2FC': fc, 'pvalue': p})

de_bin = pd.DataFrame(binary_res)
de_bin['neg_log10_p'] = -np.log10(de_bin['pvalue'].clip(lower=1e-300))
de_bin = de_bin.sort_values('pvalue').reset_index(drop=True)
de_bin['rank'] = range(1, len(de_bin) + 1)
# de_bin['padj'] = (de_bin['pvalue'] * len(de_bin) / de_bin['rank']).clip(upper=1.0)
# de_bin['padj'] = de_bin['padj'][::-1].cummin()[::-1]
de_bin['padj'] = multipletests(de_bin['pvalue'], method='fdr_bh')[1]


sig_bin = de_bin[(de_bin['padj'] < 0.05) & (de_bin['log2FC'].abs() > 0.5)]
print(f'Binary DE (Cancer vs NC): {len(sig_bin)} miRNAs (|FC|>0.5, padj<0.05)')
print(f'  Up in cancer  : {(sig_bin["log2FC"] > 0).sum()}')
print(f'  Down in cancer: {(sig_bin["log2FC"] < 0).sum()}')

Binary DE (Cancer vs NC): 2049 miRNAs (|FC|>0.5, padj<0.05)
  Up in cancer  : 1792
  Down in cancer: 257
In [64]:
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(14, 5.5))

colors = ['#F97066' if (r.padj<0.05 and r.log2FC>0.5) else '#14B8A6' if (r.padj<0.05 and r.log2FC<-0.5)
          else '#D4D4D4' for _, r in de_bin.iterrows()]
axes[0].scatter(de_bin['log2FC'], de_bin['neg_log10_p'], c=colors, alpha=0.6, s=12, edgecolors='none')
axes[0].axhline(-np.log10(0.05), color='grey', ls='--', lw=0.8)
axes[0].axvline(0.5, color='grey', ls='--', lw=0.8)
axes[0].axvline(-0.5, color='grey', ls='--', lw=0.8)
axes[0].set_xlabel('log₂FC (Cancer vs No Cancer)')
axes[0].set_ylabel('-log₁₀(p)')
axes[0].set_title('Volcano — Cancer vs No Cancer', fontweight='bold')
for _, r in de_bin.nlargest(6, 'neg_log10_p').iterrows():
    axes[0].annotate(r.miRNA, (r.log2FC, r.neg_log10_p), fontsize=6.5, ha='center')

if len(sig_bin) > 0:
    top = pd.concat([sig_bin.nlargest(10, 'log2FC'), sig_bin.nsmallest(10, 'log2FC')]).drop_duplicates('miRNA').sort_values('log2FC')
    axes[1].barh(range(len(top)), top['log2FC'].values,
                 color=['#F97066' if fc > 0 else '#14B8A6' for fc in top['log2FC']], edgecolor='white')
    axes[1].set_yticks(range(len(top)))
    axes[1].set_yticklabels(top['miRNA'], fontsize=8)
    axes[1].axvline(0, color='black', lw=0.8)
axes[1].set_xlabel('log₂FC'); axes[1].set_title('Top DE miRNAs', fontweight='bold')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
In [59]:
stage_lookup = dict(zip(meta['Title'], meta['Stage']))
stages = pd.Series(df_log.columns.map(stage_lookup), index=df_log.columns)

early_mask = stages.isin([0, 1]) & (labels_binary == 'Cancer')
late_mask = stages.isin([3, 4]) & (labels_binary == 'Cancer')

print(f'Early-stage cancer: {early_mask.sum():,}')
print(f'Late-stage cancer:  {late_mask.sum():,}')

stage_res = []
for feat in df_log.index:
    ve = df_log.loc[feat, early_mask].values
    vl = df_log.loc[feat, late_mask].values
    fc = vl.mean() - ve.mean()
    _, p = stats.ttest_ind(vl, ve, equal_var=False)
    stage_res.append({'miRNA': feat, 'log2FC_late_vs_early': fc, 'pvalue': p})

de_stage = pd.DataFrame(stage_res).sort_values('pvalue').reset_index(drop=True)
de_stage['rank'] = range(1, len(de_stage) + 1)
de_stage['padj'] = (de_stage['pvalue'] * len(de_stage) / de_stage['rank']).clip(upper=1.0)
de_stage['padj'] = de_stage['padj'][::-1].cummin()[::-1]

sig_stage = de_stage[(de_stage['padj'] < 0.05) & (de_stage['log2FC_late_vs_early'].abs() > 0.3)]
print(f'\nStage-associated miRNAs: {len(sig_stage)} (|FC|>0.3, padj<0.05)')
print(f'  Higher in late : {(sig_stage["log2FC_late_vs_early"] > 0).sum()}')
print(f'  Higher in early: {(sig_stage["log2FC_late_vs_early"] < 0).sum()}')

de_stage.to_csv('GSE211692_stage_DE.csv', index=False)
de_stage.head(15)

Early-stage cancer: 4,889
Late-stage cancer:  2,216

Stage-associated miRNAs: 670 (|FC|>0.3, padj<0.05)
  Higher in late : 59
  Higher in early: 611
